CustomField.description: API Name of the root SObject (e.g., Account) for SOQL-backed templates, or one of the sentinels: 'ApexProvider' (v4 Apex Data Provider — see Query_Config__c for the provider class), 'FlowJsonData' (data supplied at runtime via DocGenFlowAction.jsonData). Schema-required; never null.
CustomField.label: Base Object API Name
